sections.paragraph:
Original: קרס קירס

Transliteration: qêyrôs qêrôs

Phonetic: kay-roce'

BDB Definition:

Keros = "ankle"
  1. head of a family of temple slaves who returned from exile with Zerubbabel

Origin: from the same as H7166

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
